mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_name, item_name, amount, status FROM charges ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, patient_name, item_name, amount, status FROM charges WHERE patient_name = #{patientName} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, patient_name, item_name, amount, status FROM charges
AND patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{patientName}, '%')
AND item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM charges WHERE patient_name = #{patientName} AND status = '未缴费'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO charges (patient_name, item_name, amount, status) VALUES (#{patientName}, #{itemName}, #{amount}, #{status})
